ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the operator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the operator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the operator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the operator */,
  "date_founded" TEXT /* Date the operator was founded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "api_number" TEXT /* API number of the well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field the well is located in */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., oil, gas) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who owns the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date the well was drilled */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the fields table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the field in square kilometers */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the field (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the field */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the production data belongs to */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "oil_produced" REAL /* Amount of oil produced */,
  "gas_produced" REAL /* Amount of gas produced */,
  "water_produced" REAL /* Amount of water produced */,
  "sand_produced" REAL /* Amount of sand produced */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the wellhead */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the wellhead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production history entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the production history belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "total_oil_produced" REAL /* Total amount of oil produced */,
  "total_gas_produced" REAL /* Total amount of gas produced */,
  "water_produced_total" REAL /* Total amount of water produced */,
  "sand_produced_total" REAL /* Total amount of sand produced */,
  "average_pressure" REAL /* Average pressure over the period */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature over the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_history_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
